title: Shutdown VI
description:
Shuts down the Epson RC+ 8.0 server process that was started when the Initialize VI was called.

Inputs

Spel Ref
		 In	Spel reference from a previous Spel
		 Ref Out.

Error In	Error condition from a previous Spel
		 node.

Outputs

Error Out	Error condition output for subsequent
		 Spel nodes.
notes: The Shutdown VI must be called for each instance of the library.  This will shutdown the associated Epson RC+ 8.0 server process.
